overview: Aura Suites is a luxury short-term rental platform in Palermo Hollywood, Buenos Aires, showcasing high-end design apartments with curated art and lifestyle experiences. Features a fully modular, CRUD-enabled admin system and cohesive luxury branding throughout.
features: Complete admin panel redesign with collapsible section groups and icons
Five logical admin groups: Content, Experience, Pages & Legal, Testimonials, Media
Parallax animations on the Experience page
Luxury-branded admin interface matching site aesthetics
Bug fixes for input focus, logo upload, and image display
